programme.title: South Park: Margaritaville

programme.title: South Park: Stanley's Cup
programme.desc: Hitting rock bottom, Stan finds himself without a job, no bicycle and the only way out of his situation is to coach the peewee hockey team. Stan is about to find out that being a coach means facing his past, reliving a life he would rather leave behind.

programme.title: South Park: Marjorine
programme.desc: The boys are on a secret mission to find out exactly what happens behind closed doors when the fourth grade girls have a sleepover. The plan is simple: fake Butters' death, resurrect him as a girl, and infiltrate this age-old feminine tradition.

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park: Coon 2: Hindsight
programme.desc: 'Coon and Friends' set out to help the victims of BP's latest catastrophic drilling accident in the Gulf. Much to the Coon's dismay, another Super Hero gets there first.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion Rises
programme.desc: Mysterion's true identity is revealed. Meanwhile, the Coon, scorned by his fellow Super Heroes, turns to the demon god Cthulhu to help him get his revenge on friends and the rest of mankind.

programme.title: South Park: Coon vs. Coon and Friends
programme.desc: Coon and Friends find themselves at the mercy of Cartman who now has the dark lord, Cthulhu, doing his bidding. Kenny wrestles with the curse of his super power through his alter ego, Mysterion.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Finds Love

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland. Meanwhile, Kyle is aghast at Cartman getting his dreams, and renounces his faith.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita

programme.title: The Closer: Elysian Fields
programme.desc: The squad investigates the murder of a man who, 10 years ago, was the lead suspect in the murder of two girls. The state of the body indicates he was dragged behind a truck a full day before being shot twice in the head and dumped in Elysian Park.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Melt My Heart to Stone
programme.desc: When a statue breaks open to reveal a dead woman inside, Jane and Maura must find the killer quickly as the body count begins to rise. Back at headquarters, a new homicide detective is named to the squad.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Class Action Satisfaction

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Love the Way You Lie

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: Gods, Guns and Government (Part 1)
programme.desc: We analyze the reasons for the raid of a bizarre religious compound in Waco, Texas in 1993, and look at what was happening inside the Branch Davidian compound.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: End of Days (Part 2)
programme.desc: The siege at Waco ended in a fiery battle that killed David Koresh, his followers, and his multiple wives and children. TV news crews and demonstrators watched in horror as the ranch went up in flames.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed

programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. This vast land is home to dangerous predators, including the deadly hippopotamus. But it's her inner demons that threaten Andrea's survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: For Better or A Lot Worse
programme.desc: The first couple to take on a twenty-one day challenge tests themselves and their relationship as they take on the Guyana jungle. They battle jaguars, anacondas, caiman, and more than two-million species of insects.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stone Cold
programme.desc: An Army vet and newly married man grapple with gender norms in the mountains of Croatia. Extreme hunger and freezing temperatures force the two to bond while a storm threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Worlds Collide
programme.desc: Former military man, Chance is paired with an optimistic naturalist, Melissa, in the Amazon Jungle. Humidity, violent storms, caiman, and red-bellied piranha are just some of the threats they face. If they make it to day 21 they're in for a big twist.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Spirits Are Angry
programme.desc: A haunted Colombian rainforest punishes the survivalists with threats from deadly jaguars, 300 species of snakes and relentless biting insects. However, their challenge is threatened when they don't heed the curse of the jungle.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: When Cows Attack
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Yes, cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build, and the race is on to finish the project before father Paul must leave for work.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tracey's Story
programme.desc: Most of the extreme weight on Tracey's body resides in her shockingly misshapen legs. They're so massive with severe lymphedema, that gastric surgery is her only chance of survival. Brenda and Melissa prepare for skin removal surgery.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Laura's Story
programme.desc: Laura has used food to cope with her emotions for too long. Confined to a wheelchair and relying on an oxygen tank to breathe, she depends on her husband and mother to survive. Love for her family must conquer her demons if she's to turn her life around.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Paula's Story
programme.desc: Paula has had a tough life and, at more than 600 pounds, has built a wall around herself to push people away. When she suddenly loses someone she loves, Paula can no longer ignore the threat of losing her own life -- especially for her children's sake.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Chuck's Story
programme.desc: Chuck weighs almost 700 lbs. and it has hindered every aspect of his life. He's had to downsize his business, and his wife feels like a single parent who is ready to leave him.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Where Are They Now?: Chuck and Paula
programme.desc: Chuck starts from scratch during his second year of weight loss, discovering a promising new relationship. Paula juggles many responsibilities at once as she tries to stay on track for her weight-loss goal.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Marla's Story
programme.desc: Marla is so heavy she cannot stand up. Bedridden, her true weight is unknown but estimated at 800 pounds. Marla must face the facts about her health and the toll it takes on her supportive family if she is to save her health.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Where Are They Now?: Laura and Marla
programme.desc: Laura has lost more than 300 pounds and is much less dependent on her husband Joey, who now is having trouble finding his way in the relationship. Marla, one of Dr. Now's most challenging patients, returns and the fireworks begin all over again.

programme.title: Obese and Pregnant

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Have OCD
programme.desc: Jenna's life is dominated by her OCD, with her second child on the way; she struggles with a condition that dictates her marriage and young son's life.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Homeless
programme.desc: Misty and Jonathan lost their home after Misty became pregnant. Now, the couple lives in a tent and struggle to find jobs and housing before the baby is born, or they risk losing custody of him.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: In Prison
programme.desc: Sarah was 3 months pregnant when she entered prison, and must return there with her newborn for the duration of her sentence.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: A Hoarder
programme.desc: Raine struggles to clear her house of clutter before her baby is born, but it isn't easy. She suffers from hoarding, but knows that despite her compulsion, it is crucial for her baby's safety to clean up her act before the birth of her son.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Twin Baby Surprise
programme.desc: When Jasmine is taken to the hospital with abdominal cramps, she is stunned to learn she's in labour with a breech baby and shocked that there's a twin.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Vasectomy Baby
programme.desc: After a negative pregnancy test, Monique is in shock when she delivers a baby in her bathroom. Afraid that there's no time to wait for an ambulance, she gets in her car and drives her newborn to the hospital herself.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Crash and Born
programme.desc: When a student has a seizure behind the wheel, doctors discover that what's ailing her is much more serious than fatigue.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in My Sweatpants
programme.desc: Emily fears her appendix has burst and her mother rushes her to the emergency room, but before Emily can get out of the back seat, something slides down the leg of her pants.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby and a Girdle
programme.desc: After a complicated pregnancy including a bout with Bell's Palsy, Victoria struggles to lose her baby weight. Never suspecting the real reason behind her extra pounds, she suddenly goes into labour at her mother-in-law's house.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in the Bowl
programme.desc: Dragica just lost the weight from her first pregnancy, and is shocked when she gives birth to a baby in the toilet.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Like Mother, Like Daughter

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: For the Love of Family

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: Two families welcome a new child into their fold. Two defiant boyfriends return, while another slips away.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Easier Said Than Done
programme.desc: The limits of motherhood are tested when Nicole has a c-section and Mariah refuses to help because of AJ. Kim goes through a painful labour and delivery. Chaé learns that her baby may have a heart condition.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Larissa and Anthony
programme.desc: After being catfished by her high school best friend, Larissa turns to her online friend Anthony for support. Feelings between them grew to love, but after a few false moves on Anthony's part, Larissa is worried that he too is lying.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda and Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats and late night calls Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kristen and Sarah
programme.desc: The pandemic is not slowing Nev and Kamie down as they set out virtually to help Kristen find the woman she loves, Sarah. The search is derailed when a twist so huge rocks everyone's understanding of the truth.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dre and Casey

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crash Course
programme.desc: In Galveston County, a feisty gator needs a new home. Sneaky shrimpers try to conceal their catch. A family's property is damaged by stray bullets. On Lake Texoma, the game wardens stage a boat crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Big Game of Texas
programme.desc: During deer season, a trophy buck is the ultimate prize, out-of-state hunters are hit with multiple violations, and shots are fired during an illegal night hunt. Then, a large gator is trapped in wire and a grey fox is found in a residential area.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bloodied Beach
programme.desc: Officer Benvenuti chases a pair of lobster poachers, while Officer Courtney comes to the aid of a bloodied man on the beach. Meanwhile, Sergeant Cheney is determined to catch the trespassers found on nearby railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: At the start of hunting season in Maine, the wardens nab violators who are illegally illuminating wildlife, firing guns from their vehicles, and hunting over baited deer stands. Warden Lounder finds himself in a dangerous situation when he is surrounded.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Breeders, Poachers and Trespassers
programme.desc: Two wounded pelicans are saved, a caracara bird is sent to local rehabbers and a snake breeder is questioned. Then, a pair of wardens check for illegal shellfish aboard an oyster craft, while boaters are suspected of possessing a controlled substance.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With temperatures dropping, wardens watch the Canadian border for illegal hunting.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed
programme.desc: A look back at the most exciting moments of the season, as well as behind-the-scenes footage of what it takes to make a show about the Maine game wardens.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shock on the Bay
programme.desc: On the Gulf, hundreds of sea turtles face death during a cold spell. A tip leads to a raid on a deer poacher in central Texas. Wardens crack down on white-tailed deer hunters throughout the state, but in Southwest Texas, mule deer season is in full swing.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy
programme.desc: The Georgia Aquarium sends a team to Cape Town, South Africa to help rehabilitate and release a group of African penguins into the wild. A dive team installs a shipwreck feature into the Ocean Voyager exhibit to provide an enrichment for their sea turtle.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Seal the Deal
programme.desc: Two African penguins, Freya and Neo, welcome a young chick, but there's cause for concern when health problems arise. Staff work to train a trio of harbor seals to ride the elevator, with the only hiccup being a nervous seal named Floyd.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Otter Tale
programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rusty Rooted River Shack
programme.desc: Pete and the NTS team head to the sleepy hamlet of Trempealeau, Wisconsin along the banks of the Mississippi to build a charming, rustic river shack themed treehouse for two parents who yearn for an easy escape after a long day.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Alaskan Treetop Sauna
programme.desc: Pete creates an arboreal abode for an adventurous Alaskan couple that offers all the warm fuzzies they get from the outdoors without having to brave the bitter mountain cold.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Antonio Brown's Steel City Skybox

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Tizona of El Cid

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Japanese Ono
programme.desc: Four smiths are tasked with forging a blade that must fit perfectly into a puzzle piece cut out. After two puzzling rounds, the final two smiths return home to recreate the ancient samurai pole axe, the Japanese Ono.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ah, Shoot!

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hiding Houdini
programme.desc: Get spellbound with the Pawn Stars when a book written and signed by legendary magician Harry Houdini appears in the shop. Then, Corey and Chum are in for a shock when they spot a vintage X-ray unit. Later, Chumlee takes a vow of silence.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Clowning Around
programme.desc: A Gene Autry guitar and a portrait of Red Skelton arrive at the shop. Then, Chum decides to sell his shoe collection at the shop while Rick has different thoughts on the subject.

programme.desc: Don't get fooled at the pawn shop when a seller hands Chumlee a thirty dollar bill. Will this curious cash have Chum reaching for his wallet to buy it or will it turn out to be a costly currency that's not worth making a deal?

programme.desc: A set of royal British armor has Rick suiting up to strike a bargain. Chumlee's purchase of a U. S. Open custom electric guitar gets no love from Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Who's Pawning With Me!
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee test out an old school 1960s Dune Buggy. Then, Rick jives with an original Jackson Five autograph that makes its way into the store. Plus, Chumlee drafts a new shop mission statement when he checks out props from 'Jerry Maguire'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick and the Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Rick and Chum try to work out a deal on an old weight loss device. Then, a seller comes in with a sketch allegedly signed by Tom Petty. Chum tries to connect to the other side.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ship Happens
programme.desc: Rick travels to Boston to check out an iconic warship. Back at the shop, Corey examines a guitar signed by Paul McCartney. Afterwards, the guys look at a curious corkscrew collection and an Apple 1.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Bombsight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: A seller brings in a trophy awarded to basketball legend Julius 'Dr. J' Erving. Meanwhile, Rick examines a bombsight from WWII and little coin nicknamed the 'Scarface'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bang, Zoom, Pawn on the Moon!

programme.desc: When a successful tax attorney is found strangled to death on his Ft. Pierce, Florida property, detectives scrutinize jealous boyfriends, deadbeat tenants, and delinquent clients on their way to finding their killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Blood Trail
programme.desc: In 1999, Theresa Wesolowski of Germantown, WI was found with 46 stab wounds. Investigators found a tiny clue that finally nailed the killer, hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Rotten to the Core
programme.desc: The heartland of Nebraska is not immune to murderous revenge. A once-happy family is frayed by anger and jealousy when an unlikely affair is revealed, and a scandalous tattoo seals the fate of more than one member of this family.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Sex, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: A frantic 9-1-1 caller informs police he's found a family member dead. At first, it looks like a simple case of suicide. But a deeper dig reveals a secret world of sex tapes, broken promises and unbelievable murder motives.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Rocking the Cradle
programme.desc: In quiet, little Honesdale, Pennsylvania one family endures heartache, teen pregnancy and addiction, but keeps moving forward. It's only when someone from the past disturbs the delicate balance is murder in the midst.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Twisted Sisters
programme.desc: Twins Betty and Peggy Woods survived an abusive home in rural Alabama. Years later, Peggy and Betty, stark opposites, are both tragically caught up in a sorted murder-for-hire plot. And only the hit man knows which twin was guilty.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fatal Fraternity
programme.desc: Identical twins Wasel and Wael Ali were obsessed with power from an early age. Using false identities they torment unsuspecting people until they become victims of their own game. These twins share more than DNA, they share the same deadly fate.

programme.title: Evil Twins: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Identical twins lived nearly identical lives, but one terrible night, one brother shot his twin in a drunken rage.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Green Eyed Monsters
programme.desc: As children, Darlene and Charlene Shuler lived modest lives in South Carolina. But as adults, they lived very lavishly. Insatiable greed and deceit between the sisters ran rampant. Eventually, their bond would be shattered by a single gunshot.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Devil You Know
programme.desc: 20-year-old Missy Grubaugh, a devout Christian, is saving herself for marriage. But Missy's innocent charms attract the wrong type of men… with deadly results.

programme.title: Betrayed: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon admits she's struggled to find someone to take care of her. That's why she returned to school and landed a lucrative job. Sadly, though, one of her men will end her life just as this new chapter begins.

programme.title: Betrayed: Down for the Count
programme.desc: Handsome Morris Blankenbaker, small town sports legend, is a happy family man… until he gets thrust into a love triangle with his best friend and gorgeous wife. Hidden rivalries and simmering jealousies surface, leading to Morris's chilling death.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Stranger Calling
programme.desc: Detective Rod Piukkala faces one of the most haunting cases of his career when a brutal and mysterious killer engages the police in an ever-escalating game of 'Catch Me If You Can,' taunting authorities and threatening to kill again.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Waco
programme.desc: A look at the April 19, 1993 FBI raid of a religious compound in Waco, Texas that left seventy-six members of a small, obscure religious cult dead, including twenty-six children.

programme.title: Unabomber
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs, but when his brother David realized who the Unabomber was, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Manson
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate/ LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his "Family" of misfit killers. Archival news reports, photos, and interviews paint a searing portrait of 1960s Los Angeles.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Unabomber
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs, but when his brother David realized who the Unabomber was, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. Two men carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Thin-Skinned
programme.desc: Mark has a Montana client who wants to give a modern home a classic log cabin look. The guys build a cabin facade using antique log veneers. They also use more log veneers to create a new piece for the Barnwood Showroom. Mark then tours a beautiful home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dream Builders
programme.desc: Mark and the guys help folks save old log homes, build new ones, and fulfill lifelong dreams restoring antique cabins.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Shaver-Haley Home: The Whole Story
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders save a West Virginia family's log home just days before the bulldozer gets it.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored: Cottage Style
programme.desc: Preservationist Brett Waterman transforms homes with bad renovations and ugly additions.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: New Hampshire Barn: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the move of a massive 1802 timber frame barn from New Hampshire to South Carolina, from complicated take-down, through an epic build, all the way to the dramatic finish visit.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Perfect Cabin, Perfectly Restored
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders discover one of the finest cabins they've ever seen. They take it down in West Virginia, then restore it in South Carolina. Mark returns to see the amazing home fully finished.

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Charlestonian Dream 'Tiny'
programme.desc: A family of four brings the unique character of Charleston, South Carolina into their tiny house build. They include traditional touches on the outside like a shell stone path, and the Southern charm flows indoors with wood countertops and a sitting area.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Skylight to the Stars and a Stunning Free-Form Lanai
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler build a brand new house in an upcountry area of the Big Island. Skylights are placed throughout the home, including a giant one in the master bedroom that will allow the homeowners to sleep under the stars.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Looking Out for Lava Tubes in Kona
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are on the hunt to find an empty lot with great ocean views. They want to build a spec home on the property that they can turn around and sell in the coming year.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Splash of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Sliding Into Paradise
programme.desc: A young Tennessee family's steep backyard has made it impossible to enjoy. Kyle and Justin build a family fun zone that includes a waterfall, a fire pit, and a custom waterslide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dueling Waterslides
programme.desc: Brian and Paul design the perfect pool complete with giant dueling waterslides. They face a slippery slope, however, when they battle equipment issues while building an artificial hill to support tens of thousands of pounds of natural granite rock.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool
programme.desc: A couple want an alluring yard that incorporates the beauty of their cliff-side property. The enlarged yard area gets a deck bisected by a faux stream, a feature-filled pool with stone slab bridge, jumping boulders and even a slide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Bling by the Bay
programme.desc: A Florida family recruits the kings to design a sleek, modern pool for their oceanfront home on Tampa Bay. The crew creates an over-the-top pool with a vanishing edge spa and a roman soaking tub that's adorned with LED lighting and fire bowls.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Scott Conant shows Michael his favourite burger and brew bar in an out-of-the-way corner of New Orleans, and then in Kansas City, Michael learns how two brother have stormed the classic barbecue scene with their award winning smoked meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Tastes of the Tropics
programme.desc: Pastry chef phenom, Ron Ben-Israel, hangs with Michael Symon in Baton Rouge, La. to feast on a mile-high key lime pie and Caribbean-inspired brisket melt.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Me In Texas
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking sees that everything is bigger in Texas, first meeting Pit Master Levi Goode at Armadillo Palace in Houston. On Levi's custom rotisserie trailer, they roast a 250-pound side of beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: One-of-a-Kind Rigs
programme.desc: Roger meets Josh Pollack, owner of Rosenberg's Bagels & Delicatessen in Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Sizzling Steaks
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets Tom Perini at his restaurant, Perini Ranch Steakhouse in Buffalo Gap.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Bang for Your Buck
programme.desc: Frugal foodies rejoice! From huge servings of hot chicken and supersized subs to one-of-a-kind gourmet pizza and some of the biggest burgers around, you always get a bang for your buck at these Food Paradise finds.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Best of the Fests
programme.desc: From big, bold Hawaiian burgers at the Bite of Seattle and slammin' sausages in St. Louis to the biggest crawfish boil in Louisiana, there's almost too much to eat at these food festivals across the nation.

programme.title: Food Paradise: T.G.I. Fried
programme.desc: Diners enjoy fry-day every day at these hot spots across the country, from super-stacked crispy chicken sandwiches and deep-fried lobster tails to sweet potato beignets and fanciful churros.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big D Delights
programme.desc: Ali Khan is tracking down the best deals in Dallas for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. He comes in hot with a sweet and savory Monte Cristo donut and then checks out the The Big D's BBQ scene for some succulent burnt ends.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Eatin' Ok in the Okc
programme.desc: Ali Khan is tracking down the best deals in Oklahoma City, Okla., for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. Typically known for its rugged Western roots, OKC has a food scene that's surprisingly multi-cultural.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pizza
programme.desc: Roger Mooking presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Mexican Feast

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Global Flavors of Texas

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Small Packages, Big Flavors
programme.desc: Good things come in small packages, and that is especially true when it comes to artisanal food makers. Roger searches the Gulf Sates for tasty food with big flavor.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mud and Steel in New Mexico
programme.desc: Roger heads to the heart of New Mexico where cooking with fire is taken to new culinary heights with mud and steel. Roger visits Comida de Campos in Embudo, a farm and cooking school where delicious feasts are cooked in cone-shaped clay ovens.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Carnivore's Cookout in California
programme.desc: Roger is in central California for two meat-filled cookouts. This region is home to many vineyards, but Paso de Record Vineyard is what catches Roger's interest.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: West Coast Roasts
programme.desc: Visiting the Passmore Ranch in Sloughhouse, Roger must try to catch a fish by hand. Also, at the Santa Maria Elks Lodge, he will assist in building a fire pit for cooking up some beef.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Pizza Party
programme.desc: There's so much to love about pizza- crispy crust, savory sauce, ooey-gooey cheese and endless options for toppings. Pizza might just be the perfect meal, and Eddie Jackson has a day full of out-of-the-box slices to prove it.

programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Monkeying Around And Around/ Koala Kuisine
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Get Set to Get Wet/ Loud Louie
programme.desc: Doc teaches Melinda Mermaid how to swim. When the volume control on Doc's toy cell phone Louis gets stuck, she diagnoses him with 'Superlouditis' and teaches him how to use his inside voice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Secret Agent Double-Oh-Frog / A Tale of Two Twins
programme.desc: Follow the Muppet Babies on various adventures as they let their imaginations take flight.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Kung Timmy/ Which Witch is Which?
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that he had amazing kung-fu powers; Timmy is almost burned at the stake.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Micecapades/ Formula for Disaster
programme.desc: Poof turns Timmy and Vicki into cartoon cat and mouse characters and mayhem follows.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk Man/ Ride Along
programme.desc: Simon creates a Super Hero costume for a convention he's attending. When Alvin's bicycle is stolen, he joins forces with Officer Dangus to solve the case.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dr. Zap vs Electroboy/ Animal House Party
programme.desc: Theodore is hit by lightning and believes he's like his comic book hero, until he's told he's actually a villain. When Derek overhears that Alvin and his brothers are alone for the weekend, he plans a wild party.

programme.title: Movie: Good Burger
programme.desc: Two teenagers have a wild summer trying to save their local burger joint.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde's spring break plans are jeopardized when they only have one day to complete their list. Lori throws a sophisticated party, but it backfires when her guests don't like what she's planned.

programme.title: The Loud House: Pulp Friction/ Pets Peeved
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis. When Lana brings home a new pet, who the kids adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

programme.title: Avatar Extras: The King of Omashu
SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tutor Sauce/ Lost in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to take a shortcut to work, but gets lost along the way. After failing his driver's test, Mr. Krabs decides to teach SpongeBob how to drive himself.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: As Seen on TV/ Can You Spare a Dime
programme.desc: Krabs makes a low-budget commercial; accused of stealing, Squidward quits his job.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become completely normal, and he begins to lose all his spongey-ness. SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone, even Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfish Hunter
programme.desc: When money hungry Mr. Krabs discovers that customers love Spongebob's special jellyfish jelly Krabby Patty, he convinces Spongebob to bring him as many of the jellyfish as he can.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Growth Spout/ Stuck in the Wringer

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Help Wanted/ Reef Blowers/ Tea at the Treedome
programme.desc: Bob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; meeting Sandy for tea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot

programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Lagoon of White Agony Plains!
programme.desc: Scrooge reteams with his conniving ex-partner and old flame, Goldie O' Gilt, to find a long-lost golden lagoon, but Glomgold has other plans.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hare Today

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Stank Horse

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Stank Hole in One

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Done
programme.desc: The Banks children prepare to leave home and Phil makes an astounding announcement.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: I, Done
programme.desc: In the series finale, the Banks family prepares to move away from California.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Clubba Hubba
programme.desc: In order to take a girl out on a date, Will must first impress her very protective father.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Not With My Pig You Don't
programme.desc: When Philip's parents visit, they embarrass him with stories of his pet pig.

programme.title: Movie: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: A shy aspiring songwriter comes out of her shell while working at a popular New York bar.

programme.title: Movie: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: An aspiring journalist gets a job with a top fashion magazine in New York City. The job turns out to be more than she bargained for, however, when it keeps her at work for hours on end and creates trouble in her life at home with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Rainbow
programme.desc: A woman has dreamt her whole life about finding her true love and starting a family. Now, she's a teacher who is still on her quest for love. When a new architect moves to town, romance is in the air for both of them.

programme.title: Movie: Summer in the City
programme.desc: When a small town woman with southern charm is given a big promotion managing a store in the Big Apple, she tries to adopt a big city personality and it leads to disastrous results.

programme.title: Movie: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Motherload
programme.desc: Blanche begins dating a newscaster who has another woman interfering in his life: his mother. Meanwhile, Stan asks Dorothy to attend a counseling session with him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: Frasier: The Friend
programme.desc: Frasier's on-air appeal for friendship backfires when a boring man calls in. Frasier decides to meet Bob, but has trouble ending the friendship with his new wheelchair-bound friend when their tastes clearly conflict.

programme.title: Frasier: Come Lie With Me
programme.desc: Frasier lays down the law after finding out Joe spent the night in Daphne's room. Her reaction leaves the men paralyzed at the thought that Daphne may move out.

programme.title: Frasier: Moon Dance
programme.desc: After receiving ballroom dancing lessons from her, Niles invites Daphne to the ball at the country club as his last-minute date.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Where Diane Comes Back
programme.desc: Frasier's old flame, Diane Chambers, travels to Seattle for the grand opening of her play and asks Frasier for help when her backer pulls out. Meanwhile, his family fears he is falling for Diane all over again.

programme.title: Frasier: A Word to the Wiseguy
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles ask a local hoodlum to solve the problem of Maris's 102 unpaid parking tickets. In return, however, Jerome asks Frasier to tell his fiancée to agree to marry him.

programme.title: Frasier: Look Before You Leap
programme.desc: On Leap Day, Frasier encourages everyone to use their bonus day to do something special. For his 'leap,' Frasier decides to sing an aria instead of his usual song at a benefit, and tries to stop Niles from pursuing Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: High Crane Drifter
programme.desc: A stressed Frasier resorts to physical force with a rude patron, which ends up being detailed in the local newspaper. He is hailed as a hero, but soon comes to regret it when the man decides to sue Frasier for assault.

programme.title: Frasier: Chess Pains
programme.desc: Frasier becomes obsessed with chess after Martin defeats him over and over again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Is a Matchmaker
programme.desc: Lucy decides to play matchmaker after a meeting a friend of the Mertz's.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Wants New Furniture
programme.desc: Lucy tries to hide some new furniture she bought without Ricky's permission in the kitchen. Discovering his wife's extravagant purchase, Ricky insists that Lucy pays for it from her allowance.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Camping Trip
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel invite themselves on a rugged camping trip with their spouses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky and Fred Are TV Fans
programme.desc: Ricky and Fred never want to do anything but watch the fights on TV.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Jodi Arias: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Four years after the vicious killing of Travis Alexander, his ex-girlfriend Jodi Arias stands trial for his murder. Millions of people are captivated by the lurid details of their relationship.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Jodi Arias: Sex, Lies, and Photographs
programme.desc: Jodi Arias is a pretty, small town waitress and aspiring photographer. Travis Alexander is a handsome, devout Mormon, and successful businessman. Months after their sexually charged romance began, Travis was found brutally murdered in his shower at home.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed Chandra Levy?
programme.desc: Intern Chandra Levy vanishes in May of 2001 in Washington, D.C. Her cell phone and keys are found by police in her apartment that shows no signs of trouble, leading them to question where she went and who saw her last.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: DC Madam: The Woman Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: 'DC Madam' Debroah Jean Palfrey was found dead under suspicious circumstances after threatening to expose the identities of those on her client list.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 1)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her home, snatched from her bed at knifepoint by a man in the middle of the night. We look at the unbelievable nine month saga of the police investigation and family fight to keep hope alive.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 2)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her home, snatched from her bed at knifepoint by a man in the middle of the night. We look at the unbelievable nine month saga of the police investigation and family fight to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach

programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Girls Are Missing

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: Ted Escapes

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Ted Bundy: The Murder Trials
programme.desc: Ted Bundy helped prepare his own defense, but would his amateur lawyering help him beat the rap or send him to the electric chair?

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: High Country Bear Lair
programme.desc: The Raneys build an old style root cellar and an innovative greenhouse and attempt to inspire two off-grid reluctant teenage sisters to help bring their father's dream to life.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Safer at Home-stead
programme.desc: The Raney family turns cameras on themselves as they shelter in place on their Alaskan homestead. When a moose kill is discovered dangerously close to their cabin, Marty attempts to track the predators.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Off Grid and Under Pressure
programme.desc: Seven strangers come together to create a self-sustaining community in Alaska's wilderness. Over the next 100 days, they struggle to gather food and build shelters before winter arrives. Clashing personalities and priorities put everything at risk.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auction Boogaloo
programme.desc: The buyers welcome Rene and Casey back to the auctions with a healthy dose of badgering and competition. Dave heats things up and finds a piece of board game history. Darrell and Brandon show their moves outside of the auctions.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locktoberfest!
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon return to the site of their biggest score while the other buyers are focused on taking down the self-proclaimed 'King of Montebello.' Jarrod and Brandi land a locker that leads them to something called a 'Herbmeister.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: My Little Brony
programme.desc: The buyers head south to Oceanside, CA, which is Rene's backyard and he intends to make the competition pay for coming to his territory. Jarrod and Brandi discover that friendship can be magic and profitable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Along the Swatchtower
programme.desc: The buyers throw down in Koreatown. Dave expects to score some high-end merchandise, while Darrell struggles as he's never been to this area before. Mary fights for her lockers, and Jarrod may just push Brandi over the edge.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A San Marcos Mitzvah
programme.desc: An auction in San Marcos brings Darrell and Brandon to their home turf and Mary finds a way to deal with inflated prices.

programme.title: Storage Wars: North Hollywood Hustle
programme.desc: The competition becomes fierce in North Hollywood and even Dan and Laura can't escape the tension. Dave scores a locker that may be a hit and Rene fights past the local buyers to have some fun.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Gutfather

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Adventures of Max Profit

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge

programme.desc: Tragedy strikes the Montecito with the unexpected death of someone in the organization. Despite the news, Ed allows the Montecito's company picnic and games to carry on. Mike is appointed as the captain of the 'front of the house' team.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Ed considers retirement and ponders the idea of buying the Montecito. Meanwhile, Danny and Delinda's condo is broken into after Danny refuses to help a gang lord. Elsewhere, Sam learns that she owes millions in unpaid taxes.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Heroes
programme.desc: Mike finds out that Sam has been kidnapped by one of her whales; Danny helps a friend avoid being deployed to Iraq. Elsewhere, Delinda learns life-altering news for she and Danny.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: First Look
programme.desc: Get a first look at the series.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Last Ditch Effort
programme.desc: Kim undergoes one final procedure on her uterus in an attempt to carry another baby, but suffers from dangerous complications. Meanwhile, Khloe worries that if her new denim line does not meet its high sales expectations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Last Ditch Effort
programme.desc: Kim undergoes one final procedure on her uterus in an attempt to carry another baby, but suffers from dangerous complications. Meanwhile, Khloe worries that if her new denim line does not meet its high sales expectations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part One)
programme.desc: Kim begins to ease back into her public life, but is blindsided by some upsetting news about Kanye. Meanwhile, Khloé is pressured to mend her relationship with Cait, the family speculate over Kourtney and Scott, and Rob welcomes his first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: When It Rains, It Pours (Part Two)
programme.desc: After receiving some troubling news about Kanye while in New York for the Angel Ball, Kim rushes home to his aid. Meanwhile, Kendall worries that a bad review could jeopardize her modeling career, and Khloé clashes with Malika over priorities.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex Files
programme.desc: After an explosive fight between Rob and Chyna, the sisters feel like it is their duty to protect their brother from a toxic relationship. Meanwhile, Kris tries to rebuild her relationship with Cait, but is blindsided by some hurtful allegations.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Scott is devastated when he hears a rumor that Kourtney is hooking up with another guy and spirals back into old vices. After taking some personal time following the robbery, Kim is back to work but is reluctant to be in the public eye anymore.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part One
programme.desc: After Kim busts Scott with a girl in Dubai, the family is surprised Kourtney allowed him on the family trip to Costa Rica. The sisters discover Scott has invited yet another girl to join him in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part Two
programme.desc: After the family confronts Scott about his unwelcome guest in Costa Rica, Kourtney must inform him that he's ruined any chance of them getting back together. Meanwhile, Khloé is fed up with her family's bad attitude.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Korean boy band BTS tells all about their music.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fancy Meeting You Here
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson is stirring up trouble in Bobby Flay's kitchen and she's got the dream team to back her up.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: She Loves Me... Not
programme.desc: Private chef Eric Adjepong goes up against California native Frank Otte to see whose food can win the hearts of Daphne Oz and Lara Spencer.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Culinary Validation
programme.desc: Puerto Rican chef Jose Adorno brings his Latin style against Italian chef Adam Halberg, with both fighting to make their mark, while Today show news anchor Natalie Morales and Chopped judge Scott Conant revel in making Bobby sweat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ruling With an Iron Fist
programme.desc: Two of the toughest judges from Iron Chef, Simon Majumdar and Donatella Arpaia, come to Bobby's arena. These two know exactly what to look for in a contender.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Hold On For One More Flay
programme.desc: Bobby is not safe when Carnie Wilson joins up with her teammate from "The Kitchen", Katie Lee. They bring in from Philly, Jeremy Nolen as he battles against Indian grill master, Vijay Sadhu for a chance to go up against Iron Chef, Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ghosts of Bobby's Past
programme.desc: Actress Laura Prepon and "The Chew's" Daphne Oz team up to get Bobby Flay beat. Bobby's protégée Leia Gaccione has a surprise in store for her old mentor, while New York restaurateur Einat Admony is out for redemption since her last match.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: International Showdown
programme.desc: Katie Lee and Marcus Samuelsson hold nothing back as they aim to get Bobby beat. They take no chances with Canada's Alida Solomon and Italian Pasquale Cozzolino.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You're Masa-ing with Me!
programme.desc: Food Network's Jet Tila and Chef Carla Hall are hoping to get sweet revenge over Bobby Flay. They bring in Asian food specialists Chef Dan Jacobs and Chef Tony Nguyen to dodge Bobby's curveballs and take home a win.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Branching Out in Missouri
programme.desc: Robert Irvine returns to family-owned Drake's Place in Ferguson where business has suffered tremendously due to both the pandemic and community unrest. Robert helps the owners expand their business to bring in more revenue.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Judges as Contenders
programme.desc: The script is flipped and judgment is passed when Beat Bobby Flay judges Michael Psilakis and Seamus Mullen step up to take Bobby down themselves. Food Network's Marcus Samuelsson and Sunny Anderson decide which chef can push Bobby to his limit.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mazel Tov
programme.desc: Alex Reznik brings his kosher cuisine against Reno, Nev.'s Colin Smith in this battle for bragging rights. Iron Chef Michael Symon and soap star Susan Lucci bring the drama and the heat to take Bobby Flay down!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Orange Is the New Beat
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian and Jeff Mauro are playing the tricks and James Gillespie and restaurateur Rob Maffucci are serving the treats.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Pirates of Papua New Guinea

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Like Us
