programme.desc: A British ex-pat and his wife decide to renovate their outdated kitchen. Christina designs a modern-Craftsman look for the space, but getting all of the elements to match becomes a huge challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Moving in Together in Milwaukee
programme.desc: A young Milwaukee couple taking the next step in their relationship is looking to buy a home. She is excited for something old and charming, but he is a modern architect and sees past the charm to what might actually be structural issues.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Time Off in Guanacaste
programme.desc: An overworked dad is taking a year off with his wife and four boys in Guanacaste, Costa Rica. Relying on savings, they need an affordable rental big enough for the family. She wants a beautiful home with nice decor, but his heart is set on an ocean view.

programme.title: House Hunters: Old Rivalries Run Deep
programme.desc: Former work enemies-turned couple want to buy their first home in Philadelphia. However, old rivalries rear their ugly heads as one of the ladies pushes for a classic Philly row home and the other has her heart set on a suburban family house.

programme.title: House Hunters International: An African Family Homecoming
programme.desc: House hunters and their realtors experience buying real estate in other countries.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast: Dysfunctional to Functional Kitchen
programme.desc: Christina returns to work after having her baby, but she may need help from her friends as she juggles a newborn and tackles her new clients' home. The couple wants a bright kitchen with a modern-farmhouse design and a layout that opens up their space.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pesky Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to Santa Ana to check out an off-market listing. It appears to be in good shape, has a great layout, and with strong comparable sales in the area, this home could be a great buy.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fun House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a tip on a short sale in Anaheim, California that has plenty of potential and is certain to attract investor interest.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Trickle Down Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home for sale in Chino, California that's rundown, overgrown and in desperate need of cosmetic help.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Down to the Studs
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a 'for sale by owner' property in Whittier, California that would scare most buyers away, but they're not most buyers.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing and Mirror, Mirror
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace, and she also doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels, Chaos and Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage and constructs a cathedral ceiling and two cedar corbels for the entrance. Her renovation plans also force her to cut into the roof, and she struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial and Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tidal Wave of Tile
programme.desc: A neoclassical colonial gets a classic Tamara Day rehab. Tamara brings her unique design style to this home updating a kitchen, parlor and breakfast nook while keeping the historic charm intact on every level.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Out With the Old, in With the Bold
programme.desc: Tamara modernizes a Tudor home in desperate need of being brought out of the 70's. The outdated kitchen gets a much-needed upgrade while two uninspired living spaces get transformed into statement making rooms on the first floor.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Classic Meets Modern Farm
programme.desc: Tamara turns a big, old farmhouse into a charming country living style home. She'll create a large open floor plan with a new walk in pantry. On the second level she turns a faux fireplace into the real thing and renovates the master suite and bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Lady and the Damp
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a water damaged French Provincial in Leawood, Kansas. Years of neglect have destroyed the basement and Tamara will need to be completely redo it.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Entertaining Oasis
programme.desc: A married couple owns a wine bar and loves to entertain, but their home's not quite ready for guests due to its compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and an enormous, rotting tree.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Dreary Home Gets Bright Update
programme.desc: A baking aficionado and her husband want to convert their dark, oddly constructed home into a bright and welcoming space for them and their kids.

programme.title: Movie: Stalked by My Patient

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: What Eze the Problem?
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao have a miscommunication over a guest excursion. In the galley, Anastasia is forced to prepare foods that go against her vegan lifestyle to please the charter guest, the 'Queen of Versailles.' June continues to struggle to impress Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Whole Different Ball Game
programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon comes on board with a group of his rowdiest friends making the crew work double-time. June struggles to keep her radio on, which leaves Hannah frustrated. Jack and Travis get in hot water when they fail to respond to an alarm.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Alien Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of the Alien Cloud
programme.desc: A strange, perfect circle emerges in the clouds above the home of America's most top-secret military and space programs, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre sign is evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of the Alien Cloud
programme.desc: A strange, perfect circle emerges in the clouds above the home of America's most top-secret military and space programs, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre sign is evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Alien Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Armageddon USA
programme.desc: When the people of a thriving Midwestern town suddenly disappear, they leave behind an eerie ghost town with a dark secret. Experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if the mysterious exodus could be evidence of a freak natural disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Fire in the Cockpit
programme.desc: Some believe the fire on Apollo 1 that killed three astronauts was a top-secret cover-up, and a team of experts investigate if this disaster was a tragic accident or part of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: NASA Nazi Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of America's greatest achievements is also one of its most controversial, and now, a team of experts investigate if there was a conspiracy to fake the moon landing, uncovering a secret report on hundreds of Nazis' involved in the Apollo space program.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: CIA's Secret Space War
programme.desc: Confidential CIA files reveal a top-secret war for space between the US and the Soviets, and a team of experts investigate if new discoveries about American espionage during the Apollo program provide evidence of a conspiracy to fake the moon landing.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Killing Armstrong
programme.desc: Apollo 11's lunar module nearly killed Neil Armstrong during training, and some believe this close-call could explain a conspiracy to fake the moon landing. A team of experts investigate if dangers that the Apollo 11 crew faced were motive for a cover-up.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: Conspiracy of the Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge tech to hunt for the lost NASA tapes that recorded the Apollo 11 moon landing and shed light on a possible conspiracy, as some believe their disappearance is part of a cover-up to hide the truth.

programme.title: The Truth Behind the Moon Landing: The Hollywood Conspiracy
programme.desc: Some believe that the moon's waving American flag is the smoking gun that NASA faked the moon landing, and as a team of experts investigate this strange piece of evidence, the trail leads all the way to some of Hollywood's biggest names.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Siberian Lake Serpent and Mystery of the Bosnian Pyramid
programme.desc: For centuries, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Voodoo Zombies/ Life After Death
programme.desc: Voodoo Zombies explores claims of the existence of zombies in Haiti. In Life After Death patients experience strange effects after life saving transplant operations.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Burning Season
programme.desc: Decorated Detective Debbie Harris is put to the ultimate test when she's called in to investigate a six-alarm fire with all of the the case evidence up in flames.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Project Hitchhiker
programme.desc: When a young woman in Pickering, Ontario vanishes, evidence points to one man and a string of serial killings. But when red tape threatens to get in the way, Detective Herb Curwain is willing to do whatever it takes.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A man is viciously murdered less than one month after arriving from the Phillpines to join his resettled wife in Calgary. Detective Thomas Barrow always prided himself on being able to read people, but is haunted when his instincts fail.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Cold-Blooded Killer
programme.desc: A father goes hunting in a Florida lake and vanishes. Many people thought he was eaten by alligators, but not his mother. Seventeen years later, a stunning confession proves she was right all along.

programme.title: The Head on the Highway
programme.desc: When a human head is found along a frozen highway in Michigan, a local woman is convinced it is her missing adult son. Police uncover a series of dark secrets kept hidden by this seemingly normal suburban family.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Words from the Grave
programme.desc: A woman is gunned down in her garage after finishing a shift at work and investigators must search in vain for a motive in the brutal murder. When her boyfriend finds notes she wrote prior to the crime, the case is flipped on its head.

programme.title: Diabolical: Killer Track Record
programme.desc: Three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths are no accident. Investigators don't know that they are being played for fools by a sinister killer lurking undetected. There's only one woman who can bring him down.

programme.title: The Head on the Highway
programme.desc: When a human head is found along a frozen highway in Michigan, a local woman is convinced it is her missing adult son. Police uncover a series of dark secrets kept hidden by this seemingly normal suburban family.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Words from the Grave
programme.desc: A woman is gunned down in her garage after finishing a shift at work and investigators must search in vain for a motive in the brutal murder. When her boyfriend finds notes she wrote prior to the crime, the case is flipped on its head.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: Prichard AL is normally a quiet town but when the body of Re'Mano Campbell, a loving father, is found slain in his house the community grows apprehensive. And it'll take the cunning wit of local investigators to unravel the mystery of his murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Brother's Mission
programme.desc: Erin Moriarty tracks down the accused killer of a decorated military pilot in Brazil and wants the United States to sent her back to face a jury.

programme.title: Home Alone: Ex-ecutioner
programme.desc: When a single mom breaks up with her volatile boyfriend, she finds out he has other plans for her. Armed with a gun, he holds her hostage. As her life hangs in the balance, she has no idea her friend on the SWAT team is determined to save her.

programme.title: Home Alone: The Doorbell Rang Twice
programme.desc: Newlyweds Kristi and Jim Newman have their Christian beliefs tested to the limit when they come face to face with three masked men in their home. The intruders aren't just here to rob them, they're here to break their souls.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: A stepfather sits in prison for killing his wife and his daughters vow to keep him there. This raises the questions about the parole process and whether someone must admit guilt to be freed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets of the Mesa
programme.desc: Convicted of killing his wife in 2004, a Colorado man gets a second shot at freedom.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the Mansion
programme.desc: It was one of the most notorious cases in Texas history, an ambush in a lavish mansion that left two people wounded and two people dead, one of them a child. To this day, on one has been held accountable.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Missing Marsha
programme.desc: A woman suddenly vanishes and is not reported missing for months, her hairdresser pushes for answers.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Catfished
programme.desc: A 28-year-old is catfished by an online prankster. Incensed, he sets his target on the only person he can think of -- the girl in the pictures.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Playing Doctor
programme.desc: 24-year-old Jessika Rovell falls for Jeffrey Marsalis' charm and good looks but when she discovers his secret online life as Dr. Jeff, she realizes she's been dating a monster who stalks dating websites.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Sender: Unknown
programme.desc: 12-year-old Justin Bloxom is addicted to MySpace and attached to his cell phone. One night, Justin sneaks out of a friend's house to meet a new friend, but never returns. The investigation unravels a tangled web of fake identities and false promises.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Separated at Birth
programme.desc: Jamie Stice is seven months pregnant. But with no father around, she reaches out to the internet to share her hopes and fears. As the weeks progress, Jamie enters a dark world that will shatter her dreams and change the life of her unborn child forever.

programme.title: Web of Lies: California Scheming
programme.desc: After meeting the woman of his dreams online, radio DJ Alan Lee Lama moves over a thousand miles to be with her. When her best friend gets involved, he gets caught up in a bizarre love triangle.

programme.title: Diabolical: Hands That Rob the Cradle
programme.desc: In early 1980, two eerily similar crimes occur 400 miles apart. They both leave young mother dead and an infant child stolen. Years later, police unravel a plot so cold-blooded, it leaves everyone even seasoned homicide detectives in utter shock.

programme.title: Diabolical: Living Off the Dead
programme.desc: George Kalomeris is a family man who looks after the less fortunate in his community. But after a dying man fingers George as the gunman, police discovera monster more diabolical than anyone could ever imagine possible. ...and he's not acting alone.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.

programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders create a timber frame barn for a private collection of American muscle cars in Columbus, Texas. Mark visits one of the biggest barns he's ever seen, finds the oldest live oak tree in the state and explores some local history.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ask the Cabin Masters

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Top 10 Family Retreats

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mid-Air Care / The Itsy Bitsy Baby
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The House That Bulworth Built/ Moon Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly build a brand new home for Bulworth; The pugs rescue Spot from the moon.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Daddy Delivery/ Junior Flyer JP
programme.desc: While Pip and Freddy make a delivery on Father's Day, a baby Hedgehog gets stuck atop a hill and is too afraid to come down. Pip and Freddy help JP become a Super Duper Flier again after he gets demoted for failing to take a test.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mouse vs. Machine/ Grandpa Beagle's Day Out
programme.desc: Mickey challenges Professor Von Drake's Self-Racing Racer to a race and Billy Beagle asks the Happy Helpers to help his grandpa with some errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Going Upppppppppp!/ Gone Fishin'!
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang compete in the first Hot Dog Hills Hot Air Balloon Race.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups in the Apple / Won't You Be My Puppy
programme.desc: On the morning of the Playcare bake sale, Bob is devastated when he can't make his "Big Apple" pie because he's out of apples. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find their favorite television host's special sweater in time for his show.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Wolfy Plan/ The Lizard Theft

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie and Daisy's Flower Shower

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Clubhouse

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Safari, So Goody
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Brand New Clubhouse
programme.desc: When Donald complains everyone is in his way, Mickey and pals help him build his own clubhouse.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Round-Up
programme.desc: Mickey and pals have to gather the digits to put them back in their box after escaping.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy-Bo-Peep
programme.desc: Daisy-Bo-Peep loses her 10 sheep and enlists Mickey and the gang to help find them.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Space Captain Donald
programme.desc: When Pluto's bouncy ball bounces all the way into outer space, Mickey and our friends, led by Space Captain Donald, take a trip to the Moon to retrieve the ball.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Go-Getters

programme.desc: Professor Von Drake is working on a surprise invention when he discovers that he is missing four of his very special tools: a shape-wrench, a hammer, a paintbrush and a whistle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Happy Mousekeday
programme.desc: It's Mickey's birthday and the Clubhouse gang has organized fun activities for the big Mousekeday.

programme.title: Chuggington: Wild Safari Park / Glow Koko

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Billy Beagle's Tip-Top Garage/ Diner Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Billy Beagle films the garage crew as they try to turn a junker into a winning roadster in one day. The Happy Helpers help a TV chef rescue the Hot Dog Diner.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Racing Rivals/ The Hapless Helpers
programme.desc: Minnie comes up with a special race that can include her visiting childhood friend. While the girls enjoy a spa day, the boys fill in as Happy Helpers.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Puppy Problems/ The Mighty Little Dragon
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mystery of the Secret Gift-Giver/ Mystery at the Cooking Contest
programme.desc: When townspeople start receiving anonymous gifts, Mira searches for the secret gift-giver. Then, Pinky's dishes for the Queen's cooking contest seem to be sabotaged.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Movie: Walking Tall
programme.desc: This film recounts the story of real-life Tennessee sheriff Buford Pusser who won fame by cleaning up his backwoods county by trying to rid the town of gambling and moonshine rings.

programme.title: Movie: Four Brothers
programme.desc: After their adoptive mother is murdered during a grocery store robbery, four brothers reunite to track down her killer.

programme.title: Movie: The Story of Us
programme.desc: The owner of a Romance bookstore runs into her first love, an architect who is overseeing a development that will forever change her neighbourhood. Her nostalgia for her home clashes with his desire for change, but their romantic tension may unite them.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine
programme.desc: A woman fosters a retired military dog, while recovering from her broken engagement. When the dog's trainer returns home to claim his pup, she finds just what she looking for to mend her broken heart.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Joy
programme.desc: A woman must return to her hometown to care for her aunt during the Christmas break. While there, she meets a man and learns there is no place like home for the holidays.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: Frasier: Crane vs. Crane
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier face off when they take opposite sides in a courtroom hearing over the issue of an elderly man's sanity. Niles believes he is crazy, but Frasier interprets the man's quirks as eccentricities.

programme.title: Frasier: Police Story
programme.desc: Frasier becomes enamoured with a traffic cop after she pulls him over for speeding.

programme.title: Frasier: Where There's Smoke There's Fired
programme.desc: The station owner's new manager, millionaire Big Willy, asks Frasier to get his fiancée to stop smoking. Frasier agrees, until he discovers that the fiancée is his agent, Bebe.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Loves Roz
programme.desc: When Roz decides to date one of Niles' patients, Frasier tries to find a way to warn Roz without breaching his ethical obligation for confidentiality. Roz soon mistakes his attempts to warn her for subtle declarations of yearning.

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group
programme.desc: Frasier is puzzled when a single member of a focus group dislikes his radio show. Frasier's quest to understand why becomes an obsession and he inadvertently ruins the man's life.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again
programme.desc: To celebrate Frasier's third anniversary at the radio station, Roz gives Frasier a copy of his first broadcast. As he listens, Frasier remembers the events that occurred when he first arrived in Seattle and reunited with his family.

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Mrs. Cranes
programme.desc: When Daphne's ex-fiancé comes to visit, she quickly introduces him to her 'new husband,' Niles. Martin stirs up trouble when he decides to introduce Roz as Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: Love Bites the Dog
programme.desc: Roz sets Frasier up with a gorgeous woman, who takes a shine to Bulldog instead. But when she dumps him, Bulldog becomes so distraught that Frasier has to take over his show. Meanwhile, Niles places an ad to attract more patients.

programme.title: Frasier: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles struggle to interpret Frasier's recurring dream, in which Frasier finds himself in bed with the radio station's restaurant critic.

programme.title: Frasier: A Crane's Critique
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are ecstatic when Martin becomes good friends with a reclusive author. Trouble ensues when they discover the author's new manuscript.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers
programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: Movie: June in January
programme.desc: Every January, June goes through post-holiday blues and Alex surprises her.

programme.title: Movie: Ms. Matched
programme.desc: A successful wedding planner is paired with a financial advisor at a wedding expo and soon realizes she is giving the exact opposite advice to their audience. When they are forced to spend time together, they find out they have a lot in common.

programme.title: Movie: Chance at Romance
programme.desc: A woman thinks she has met the man of her dreams online. But after she's invited to an art show in his hometown she finds out she's been communicating with the man's son and that her dream guys isn't interested in a relationship.

programme.title: Movie: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: A reality TV host is fired from her job and so she returns home before Valentine's Day. While home, she finds herself running the town's festival, with her ex-fiancé and their two, scheming mothers.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy
programme.desc: An elementary school teacher in South Park is conducting an illicit affair with a student while Cartman becomes the new school hallway monitor. When a student in his jurisdiction commits an infraction, Cartman takes it a little too personally.

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: The boys travel to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the 'Getting Gay with Kids' choir tour.

programme.title: South Park: Lice Capades
programme.desc: When Mrs. Garrison refuses to name names about an infestation of head lice that plagues South Park Elementary, Cartman finds a way to detect who has lice.

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Cartman's mom gets help from an expert when she realizes she cannot control her son anymore. The expert, known as 'The Dog Whisperer', may have what it takes but Eric Cartman's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Watching You
programme.desc: When romance blogger Nora seeks inspiration for her book by having a passionate fling with her sexy next door neighbour, her 'no strings attached' relationship quickly spirals into a dangerous obsession.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by My Neighbor
programme.desc: A woman finds herself the target of an obsessive neighbourhood watchman who aims to prove he's the best man to protect her, even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Bachelor Next Door
programme.desc: A new neighbour wreaks havoc in the lives of a young, newly engaged couple.

programme.title: Movie: Hometown Killer
programme.desc: A woman finds her life in danger when she reconnects with an old high school friend who is now a police officer. The cop, still damaged from the bullying she experienced in high school, is bent on revenge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Final Days of Whitney Houston
programme.desc: New details surrounding Whitney Houston's last days and her tumultuous relationship with Bobby Brown are revealed.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Prince: The End
programme.desc: Uncovering the secret struggles the music genius faced, from Prince's early years to the final days leading up to his shocking death.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Gianni Versace Murder
programme.desc: Celebrity designer Gianni Versace was fatally shot on the steps of his Miami Beach mansion in broad daylight. The mystery of his death is unraveled by those closest to him and his killer Andrew Cunanan.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: JFK Jr's Final Flight
programme.desc: Examining the factors that led to the crash that killed John F. Kennedy Jr. and a never before seen interview with a person who may have been the last person to speak to JFK Jr, moments before the crash.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Waco: End of Days (Part 2)

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of Heaven's Gate

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed JonBenet Ramsey

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: How It All Pans Out

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Ice Mine Cometh
programme.desc: Winter has come along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim. Kris tries to set up and mine in one day. Emily's dependable Claim 14 shocks her.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: A regulator freeze-up cuts off Shawn's air supply just days into the winter mining season. Vernon returns to the ice aiming to buy Claim 16, while Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Snow Blind
programme.desc: The clock ticks as an impending, violent arctic storm the Siberian Express gathers strength. Shawn can't quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie miner. Emily finds gold but her equipment fails. Vernon risks everything to test Claim 16.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Entering Wild, Wild Country

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Ed vs Matt Wright
programme.desc: Ed challenges Matt 'The Juggernaut' Wright in the Wanshan Archipelago off the coast of southern China. They race to secure islands that can provide materials to build rafts capable of a 25 km sea crossing.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Borneo

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Snow Blind
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: A violent arctic storm approaches as Shawn struggles to quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie, Emily's equipment fails and Vernon risks it all.

programme.desc: Leaving comfortable lives behind, strangers journey to Alaska chasing dreams of an off-grid community. With only 100 days until winter, it's a race against nature. They immediately set off to hunt moose, but struggle against the elements and each other.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Ed vs Matt Wright
programme.desc: Ed challenges Matt 'The Juggernaut' Wright in the Wanshan Archipelago off the coast of southern China. They race to secure islands that can provide materials to build rafts capable of a 25 km sea crossing.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Borneo
programme.desc: Ed Stafford challenges ultra-fit ex-Marine and ropes expert Aldo Kane to race across the tangled wilds of Borneo's mangrove swamps.

programme.title: Sherpa
programme.desc: See how the Sherpa community united to reclaim Mount Everest following the 2014 avalanche that killed 16 of their members. The Sherpas are forced to consider the future of Everest climbing and whether anything justifies the danger they face.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: An industrial fire leads to an explosion; an F-14 jet crashes over the ocean; wind causes two hydro boats to crash; a superbike crash leaves a flaming motorcycle on the raceway.

programme.title: Sport Fishing Television: Peak Season
programme.desc: A look back at trophy fish caught across the three oceans in during the 2020 season.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: Bass Pro Tour: 2020 Stage Four Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A Day 1 - Kis
programme.desc: Day 1 of Stage 4 Heavy Hitters Qualifying Group A, from Kissimmee Florida.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part One
programme.desc: The Raneys must build a dam and plan an entire cabin move to help the Smith family in a Missouri flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part Two
programme.desc: Marty's dam is put to the test as the Raneys move an entire cabin into the flood zone. A surprise arrival of chicks has Misty needing an upgrade for her chicken coop. Matt crafts a knife blade in the Smiths' newly improved foundry.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake Shattered
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground while Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse and Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Safer at Home-stead
programme.desc: The Raney family turns cameras on themselves as they shelter in place on their Alaskan homestead. When a moose kill is discovered dangerously close to their cabin, Marty attempts to track the predators.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Welcome to Thunderdome
programme.desc: Contestants from all walks of life compete for glory and $25,000 cash in an arena unlike any other. A dodgeball deity tests his mettle. A fitness model shows she can do more than just look the part. 'Aaron Rodgers' tries his hand at a brand-new ballgame.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Clear and Pheasant Danger
programme.desc: The Browns take part in a competitive pheasant hunt as a way to celebrate and give thanks for everything they have.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Fist Pumping
programme.desc: Lori's rumba and salsa first dance gets her celebration started; Shannon's 'Jersey Shore' theme has fists pumping all night.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Wishing Lantern
programme.desc: Aurea's afternoon nuptials include a garden ceremony, and Lara treats her guests to a Viennese dessert hour.

programme.desc: Larissa faces her final court date while Elizabeth deals with the aftermath of Andrei's blow up. Asuelu finally stands his ground and Colt worries his relationship is over. Michael's family is concerned that Angela is not a suitable wife.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Two Flower-Men

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Rockin' Harmonica

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat

programme.title: Sex and the City: Attack of the 5'10" Woman
programme.desc: Carrie sees Big's wedding announcement; Charlotte struggles with her body image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Boy, Girl, Boy, Girl
programme.desc: Carrie is thrown for a loop by her 20-something boyfriend's intimate revelation.

programme.title: Sex and the City: No Ifs, Ands or Butts
programme.desc: Carrie faces a tough decision when she meets Aidan, who makes it clear that he can't be with a smoker. Charlotte is horrified by her boyfriend's kissing skills. Steve and Miranda fight over practising for a million-dollar basketball shot.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Are We Sluts?
programme.desc: Carrie wonders why her guy won't hit the sheets; Miranda discovers she has an STD.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Drama Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous about meeting Aidan's family; Charlotte meets a doctor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Time
programme.desc: Carrie bumps into Big at a party; Samantha fears menopause; Miranda breaks up with Steve.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: Charlotte prompts Trey to propose; Big encounters Carrie and Aidan at a furniture show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Carrie's fling weighs on her conscience; Charlotte plays hardball over a pre-nup.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Running With Scissors
programme.desc: Carrie seeks advice about Big; Samantha's new guy wants her to be tested for AIDS.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Fieri Family Watch Party
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and family cozy up to take a look back at the first pilot episode. This cross-country drive down memory lane includes a nine-seat counter in New Jersey and a 1950s-style diner in Boston cranking out their own corned beef hash.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast
programme.desc: Guy visits a California joint to try spicy pork and knockout gnocchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Between The Bread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's always down for a good sandwich, so he's stopping in to check out some of the Triple D Nation's latest creations. A food truck in Nashville put down roots and started churning out cheesy concoctions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Brisket to Bison
programme.desc: It's all about the meat as Guy Fieri crosses the country to stop at some of his favorite haunts. In Denver, a Native American eatery has a new way to serve bison, and a Nashville diner is taking lamb to the next level. Plus, Guy snoops around Yellowstone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Stuffed Stuff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows it's what's on the inside that counts and these top spots in the Triple D Nation really know how to stuff the good stuff in. Like in Eureka, Calif., where a chef is cramming calamari with shrimp and leeks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Culinary Journey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey. On the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup making a name for leaving diners speechless.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Flavor Faves
programme.desc: Check out some of Guy's favourite spots serving up all kinds of traditional ethnic dishes including hand-pulled Chinese noodles from Peaceful Restaurant, to quesadillas and tortas at Nopalito, and Guamanian classics at PDX 671.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homegrown and Homemade
programme.desc: Guy hits a restaurant South Carolina that serves collard greens right off the farm.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Po' Boys, Pasta and Pork
programme.desc: Guy goes all over the country for comfort foods like Po-Boy sandwiches, pulled pork sandwiches and a favoured bbq joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Name That Cook
programme.desc: Guy checks out three local namesake favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Spectacular
programme.desc: Guy is celebrating southern home cooking from collards and grits in South Carolina to homemade biscuits in Oregon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homestyle
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Seattle that are serving homestyle cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Classics
programme.desc: Guy explores classics from coast-to-coast; he starts in Portland and ends in Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Upper Crust
programme.desc: Guy visits a hoagie shop in Hollywood with home made rolls and a café in Portland, Oregon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Funky Finds
programme.desc: Guy discovers some hidden gems like a fish shack that flies in the fish, and a volunteer-run brunch spot where kids do the cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unconventional Comforts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to the east coast of Oahu and visits a general store serving traditional Hawaiian dishes. In Chicago, an Italian family is serving sandwiches made from scratch, and in Hernando, an underground cafe serving French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast Comfort
programme.desc: Guy is making stops up and down the east coast for some home cooking. He checks out a Southern comfort join in Cambridge, Mass., pierogi in Fall River, and meatballs and fries in Providence.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Vive La Din Din
programme.desc: Rachael Ray proves that rich and creamy chicken can be prepared in less than 30 minutes - and with only a handful of ingredients. She makes a Dijon-tarragon chicken, mashed potatoes with brie or camembert and rainbow chard with bacon and leeks.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Take Me Out to the Ball Game
programme.desc: Valerie's always been a football fan, but today Valerie's longtime friend, Lisa, and her husband, former baseball player Billy Ashley, are going to show Valerie how much fun baseball culture can be.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Smokin' Hot Flavors
programme.desc: The Kitchen is all fired up for grilling season with smokin' hot new flavours, starting with Jeff's pastrami-rubbed smoked tri-tip. Sunny whips up easy hush puppies with hot honey dipping sauce and Katie Lee makes a grilled romaine salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Biscuit Lovin'
programme.desc: The Nashville restaurant scene has exploded, and one of the town's favorites is a place called Biscuit Love. Trisha Yearwood takes her sister, Beth, to sample some of their most popular dishes. Then, they give those flavors a twist at home.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Generational Goodies
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's mom comes to the farm to share a few family recipes before baby arrives. Molly makes pastrami eggrolls as a tribute to her mother's hometown to go with citrus chicken rice bowls and grilled veggies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 12
programme.desc: Ladd drops by on Ree and the kids to see what's cooking. The Greek salad is roasted and her sesame noodles with mushrooms are stir-fried. Plus, Ree makes breaded buffalo fried mozzarella bites and creates a 'King of the Ranch' ice cream pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is speeding things up by giving her favorite comfort food recipes the 16-minute treatment, including chicken pot pie and shrimp and grits.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Comfort Food
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts share the comfort food recipes that make them happy all summer long. Sunny Anderson has a spin on a favourite with citrus glazed can-grilled chicken.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Pizza and a Movie
programme.desc: Trisha invites the guys over for pizza and a movie. She makes malted milk fudge and a seven-layer dip. Then she teaches her cowboy tour manager how to make a basil pesto pizza.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Salads For Four Seasons
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her pro tips for sensational salads for every season. For an all-in-one spring dinner, her crispy mustard chicken and frisee salad is unbeatable, and tarragon shrimp salad is perfect for an easy and delicious summer lunch.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Twin It to Win It
programme.desc: Three pairs of twins team up to show that two head chefs are better than one at winning up to $20,000 in Flavortown!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Clash of the Vegetarians!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: One Shop Showdown
programme.desc: Four thrifty chefs must make a comfort food classic breakfast, a spicy lunch and a fried dinner without returning to the market for more supplies.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Trivia Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes wild combining his brand of food trivia with his favorite culinary games. The four competitors are out to prove that they're great chefs who also know a lot about food.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Summer Belongs to You

programme.title: Bunk'd: Mud Fight

programme.title: Bunk'd: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Murphy challenges the kids to cook the camp dinner, Zuri orchestrates a heated competition between the counselors and the CITs.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Camp Stinky Waka

programme.title: Public Affairs Events

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today

programme.title: Washington Journal

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Circumstances
programme.desc: It was an unthinkable crime. Brittany Eldridge was nearly nine months pregnant when she was found dead in her apartment. Investigators focused on two men believing both had a possible motive but were they capable of murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Crack in Everything
programme.desc: For many, the holiday season is filled with joy but, for the Jennings family, the night before Christmas became a waking nightmare. A gunshot rang out and investigators had to unravel whether a secret lead to a tragic suicide or if this was murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Cold December Morning
programme.desc: Devoted to her faith and her five children, Chanin Starbuck was recently divorced and starting life over. After she was brutally murdered, the investigation revealed secrets. The case divided a family. Could a jury unite on the truth?

programme.title: Catching a Serial Killer: Sam Little
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Beth Karas follows Sam Little, America's most prolific serial killer who confessed to murdering over 90 women in 17 states, in hopes to identify how he got away with murder for so long.

programme.title: Dahmer on Dahmer: A Serial Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Dive into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Jeffrey Dahmer. With new revelations and never-before-seen interviews, the series sheds light on the grizzly and complicated investigation through the eyes of pivotal figures in the case.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Mark Riebe
programme.desc: Piers Morgan enters Florida’s maximum security Blackwater River Correctional Facility to confront Mark Riebe, a convicted killer who has since confessed multiple times to the abduction and murder of thirteen women along Florida’s Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Lorenzo Gilyard
programme.desc: At Missouri's Crossroads Correctional Facility, Piers Morgan comes face to face with Lorenzo Gilyard-the Kansas City Strangler, and sets out to discover what drove this soft-spoken, seemingly ordinary man to kill multiple times over seventeen years.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Stredney
programme.desc: A former college teaching assistant kidnaps and shoots her fiancé after he breaks off the engagement.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Gilliam
programme.desc: A wife is charged with killing her husband, an attorney with financial woes, but was it a suicide, and was she wrongly accused.

programme.title: Snapped: Caren Pressley-Brown
programme.desc: A respected business owner snaps, turning a bitter custody fight into a plot for murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable
programme.desc: The case made national headlines: A toddler left in the car for seven hours while his dad was at work. Was this a heartbreaking accident? Police said it was murder. Could any parent ever do this on purpose?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayed
programme.desc: Melissa Lewis disappeared leaving signs of a struggle and a strange orange mist behind her. Later, her boss went missing and left behind an even bigger mess, including a missing fortune. Two crimes leaving one lingering mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Nightfall
programme.desc: After a young mom is found dead on the side of a country road, 40 miles from her Knoxville home, investigators scramble to figure out how she ended up there. Tucked away in her kitchen is a clue to unravelling the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Burning Suspicion
programme.desc: At first, the fatal fire that swept through the home of a young couple looked like an accident. Then investigators took a closer look - and what they discovered about the fire, and this couple, left them burning with suspicion.

programme.title: License to Kill: Killer Surgeon
programme.desc: An arrogant cosmetic surgeon operating out of a basement permanently scars and kills patients, then shocks detectives by attempting to murder a loved one.

programme.title: License to Kill: Deadly Practice
programme.desc: When a radical underground practitioner with no medical experience promises a miracle cure online, his victims receive dangerous procedures in an unsanitary trailer sparking an unexplained death and a public health emergency in Las Vegas, NV.

programme.title: Snapped: Tammy Armstrong
programme.desc: In a classic game of good cop bad cop, a determined detective befriends a Wisconsin woman to solve her boyfriend's suspicious disappearance.

programme.title: Snapped: Whitehead Twins
programme.desc: When a young mother of 16-year-old twins is found dead, investigators must delve deep into family's complicated relationship in order to unravel the mystery of her murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandra Plunkett
programme.desc: After a bed-ridden former police officer is executed in his own home, police rely on his wife's testimony to bring the murderer to justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Ann Langley
programme.desc: When a marriage ends in flames, police must determine whether it was an accident or an act of revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Omaima Nelson
programme.desc: When a beautiful woman's much older husband disappears under mysterious circumstances, police suspect that more than just the woman's story has been cooked up.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt must go to Australia to destroy a disease created by a terrorist group made to wipe out and infect the world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Crook and Ladder
programme.desc: Maggie goes on a path of destruction after Marge throws away her pacifier. Marge gives in and sends Homer to the store to get a new pacifier, but he can't find the right brand, so Maggie comes up with her own solution.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 24 Minutes
programme.desc: With the help of Jack Bauer and Chloe O'Brian, Bart and Lisa must stop a group of bullies from releasing the ultimate stink bomb at the school's annual bake sale.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Kent Always Say What You Want
programme.desc: Kent Brockman uses a shocking expletive during the nightly news broadcast and is fired when the FCC is tipped off. The dejected anchor takes refuge with the Simpsons and Lisa plots a way to get him his position back.

programme.title: The Simpsons: He Loves to Fly and He D'ohs
programme.desc: After Homer saves Mr. Burns from drowning, Burns thanks him by taking him on a whirlwind trip to Chicago on his private plane. After returning home, Homer makes it his mission to find a job that offers him the chance to fly on a corporate jet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer of Seville
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires Homer to sing the lead in his production of 'La Bohème.' Homer wows the crowd and escapes a mob of crazed fans with the help of a mysterious woman who seems a little too concerned with Homer's well being.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Orphan Millie
programme.desc: When Milhouse's parents are lost at sea and presumed dead, his new orphan status makes him cooler than Bart. Meanwhile, Homer gets himself in hot water when he can't remember the colour of Marge's eyes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Husbands and Knives
programme.desc: Bart, Lisa and Milhouse check out a new comic book store called Coolsville and are treated like royalty. Meanwhile, Marge launches a gym for 'regular women,' and Homer fears she will dump him unless he gets into shape.
