programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Pyramid Code
programme.desc: Ancient pyramids are among the greatest wonders of the world and exist across many civilizations. Explore the origins of these structures as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Diabolical: Queen of Deception
programme.desc: 2011 is off to a rocky start when a beloved Susanville police officer is found dead. What first looks like suicide morphs into a full blown murder investigation when his wife becomes a suspect and detectives uncover a story of love, lust and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Murders
programme.desc: Pennsylvania native Janet Lynn Mickey's greatest dream is to start her own family. So, when she marries college football-star Darrell Tyburski her future seems secure. But when the young couple has children, they are led down the darkest path.

programme.title: Diabolical: Best of Friends
programme.desc: After sneaking out of his parent's Garden Grove, CA house for a secret late-night party, 19-year-old Jose Najera returns home to find both parents dead on their bedroom floor. Is it a random killing or a robbery gone wrong? The truth is more diabolical.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: A Sailor's Honor
programme.desc: NCIS agents reveal the hunt for answers in the disappearance of payroll officer Andy Muns, the organization’s oldest cold case. Muns disappeared in 1968 and was treated as a deserter and thief, but new evidence could restore honour to the fallen sailor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: The Marine's Wife
programme.desc: When a marine's wife went missing after going hiking, investigators turn to him for answers about why he waited 24 hours to report her missing. Eventually it becomes known that instead of hiking, she was meeting her lover.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: Four young women attacked, only one survivor; Maureen Maher has been on the trail of serial killer Michael Gargiulo for more than a decade. Learn how she helped crack one of the cases.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper on Trial
programme.desc: The story of Michael Gargiulo, a serial killer known as 'The Hollywood Ripper.' Michael is accused of killing three women, and attempting to kill another who lived to bear witness against him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: The Marine's Wife
programme.desc: When a marine's wife went missing after going hiking, investigators turn to him for answers about why he waited 24 hours to report her missing. Eventually it becomes known that instead of hiking, she was meeting her lover.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Stranger Online
programme.desc: 13-year-old Nicole Lovell signed on to the Kik messaging app looking for a friend, and instead became the victim of an anonymous online predator. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Strange Case of Kurt Sonnenfeld
programme.desc: Kurt Sonnenfeld claims his wife Nancy put a gun to her head and killed herself, but Denver police believe otherwise. However, they may never get a chance to prove it as he's moved with a new wife to Argentina, which has yet to extradite him to the US.

programme.title: 48 Hours: NCIS: A Sailor's Honor
programme.desc: NCIS agents reveal the hunt for answers in the disappearance of payroll officer Andy Muns, the organization’s oldest cold case. Muns disappeared in 1968 and was treated as a deserter and thief, but new evidence could restore honour to the fallen sailor.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Sex and the Married Man
programme.desc: A married man embarks on a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret from the police.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Good Deed Punished
programme.desc: A Christian couple open up their home to a young woman in need of a helping hand. But their act of charity has unexpected consequences when emotional support gives way to physical attraction and a lustful affair turns deadly.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A teen girl forbidden from dating falls hard for an older man. In a desperate bid to be with him, she runs away from home. But young love soon turns to fatal obsession.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Mission: Proof
programme.desc: Lizzie Welsh, the youngest of a tight-knit family, is killed in a tragic trucking accident, leaving behind her young son Conner. Now Lizzie's brother-in-law Gary believes her death was no accident, and that Conner may be next to die.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Fire Inside
programme.desc: When a serial arsonist murders four people in a California hardware store, fire investigators Marvin Casey and John Orr both become obsessed with the case. As fires continue to burn across the state, the two are pushed to their limits to stop the killing.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: The Devils Allure
programme.desc: Lonely widow Marilyn Burdick finally finds love again with Louis Plunkett, a charming real-estate agent. But Marilyn's only daughter Karen and her husband Jason doubt Louis' motivations and tension quickly escalates, triggering a deadly series of events.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Wheeling and Dealing
programme.desc: Feb. 24, 1996, Frank Black Jr., the owner of a school bus company, goes missing. The FBI needs to determine if he is dead, and where's his body? It's a mystery built on lies that can only be solved when someone is brave enough, to tell the truth.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Ray Kotomski, a retired corrections officer, thinks he's survived the most risky years of his life… but dealing with his second wife, her hostile brother, jealous ex-husband, and deranged stalker proves far more dangerous – and deadly.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be MacGyver
programme.desc: Serving life for a double homicide, Harold Laird breaks out of prison with great creativity. On the lam, he evades the law in a series of near misses. Exhausted, Laird finally passes out in a stolen truck. When a cop notices, he quickly calls for backup.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Underground
programme.desc: Toby Young escaped to Mexico through drug tunnels and learned the true cost of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pretend I'm a Priest
programme.desc: Con artist Fred Brito reinvented himself dozens of times and conducted a symphony orchestra, was elected to a public office, and administered mass as a fake catholic priest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: After getting arrested for robbery, Robert Askew runs from a work camp and goes back to stealing to make a living. Askew eventually gets caught again, but he escapes from jail during a hurricane and goes on a crime spree, breaking into vacation homes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.desc: Con artist Fred Brito reinvented himself dozens of times and conducted a symphony orchestra, was elected to a public office, and administered mass as a fake catholic priest.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies

programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Biggest Heist Ever/ Thrillin' Hilda!
programme.desc: After Von Drake invents a truck to carry all the Roadsters, Commander Heist steals it. Hilda asks the Happy Helpers to help her find a new sport to play.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Billy Beagle's Tip-Top Garage/ Diner Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Billy Beagle films the garage crew as they try to turn a junker into a winning roadster in one day. The Happy Helpers help a TV chef rescue the Hot Dog Diner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Pug-scape/ Luck of the Pug-ish
programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Who Let the Moths In? / Commander Meow
programme.desc: The moths infiltrate HQ, and Gekko won’t admit that he let them in until it is too late. Catboy realizes that a true Cat Explorer puts his team before the discovery.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Super-Sized Gekko!/ Take to the Skies, Owlette
programme.desc: Gekko tries to stop Luna Girl from stealing the city's parade floats! Night Ninja steals the bi-planes from the Loop-De-Loop Air Show.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Space Captain Donald
programme.desc: When Pluto's bouncy ball bounces all the way into outer space, Mickey and our friends, led by Space Captain Donald, take a trip to the Moon to retrieve the ball.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Go-Getters
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle band together to form the Go-Getters in order to help stop a group of giant baby chicks who are running loose in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Racing Rivals/ The Hapless Helpers
programme.desc: Minnie comes up with a special race that can include her visiting childhood friend. While the girls enjoy a spa day, the boys fill in as Happy Helpers.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Grandpa vs. Grandpa
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Oh, Toodles!
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake is working on a surprise invention when he discovers that he is missing four of his very special tools: a shape-wrench, a hammer, a paintbrush and a whistle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Happy Mousekeday
programme.desc: It's Mickey's birthday and the Clubhouse gang has organized fun activities for the big Mousekeday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sleeping Minnie
programme.desc: After accidentally picking a magic rose, Minnie falls into a 100-year-long sleep. Mickey discovers that the only way to wake her is to play the golden harp, so he summons all his strength and smarts to retrieve the instrument.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Bee Story
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Minnie's friend, Buzzby the Bee, find her way back home after a strong wind blows her away from her sunflower in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Frozen Giganto/ Dinosia
programme.desc: Explore the world with dinosaur friends in search of the biggest dino of them all!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Spoon in the Stone/ Gonzonocchio
programme.desc: When Rowlf tells a story about the Spoon in the Stone, Animal, Gonzo, and Piggy race off in a quest to become the greatest knight. When Gonzo loses his library book, he tells tall tales to cover the truth.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Sporty Day / Go, Chili Dogs!
programme.desc: Mickey and friends go on adventures around Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Sherlock Nose / Block Busters
programme.desc: Follow the Muppet Babies on various adventures as they let their imaginations take flight.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Big Little Baby / The Super Secret Mission
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Rakhi Mystery/ Mystery Below the Palace
programme.desc: When the bracelets that Mira and her friends made for the Rakhi holiday disappear, Mira sets out to find them before the celebration starts. When strange sounds are heard at the palace, Queen Shanti asks Mira to find out what is causing the ruckus.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show / Ticklecrabs / Escape
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Firefighter Pups / Hike Paw
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Animal Antics/ Here, Kitty, Kitty, Kitty!
programme.desc: The gang converts their roadsters into their favorite animals; Heist's kitty runs away.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Hanami Hijinks! / Happy Harajuku Helpers!
programme.desc: Daisy wants to celebrate Hanami with a perfect picnic, unfortunately things go a little haywire! The Happy Helpers participate in the annual Harajuku Fest in Tokyo!

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Catman Meets the Crimson Chin/ Genie Menie Minie Mo
programme.desc: The superhero TV show, 'Catman,' may be out of production, but its star, TV's Adam West will never rest as long as there are crimes to avenge. Timmy accidentally releases a Genie from a magic lava lamp.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crash Nebula
programme.desc: How Crash Nebula came to be.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Double Trouble/ Liar Liar
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's lab and accidentally clones himself; Alvin tells a small lie that quickly turns into a huge disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mega Bounce Battle/ Gossip Guy
programme.desc: The boys disobey Dave's orders to not play a dangerous game then have to hide their injuries when they get hurt.The school newspaper has a sudden increase in sales when a gossip column appears poking fun at other students.

programme.title: Movie: Blurt!
programme.desc: A kid known for being polite and nice finds himself unable to contain his inner thoughts, after putting on a strange pair of VR glasses.

programme.title: Movie: A Fairly Odd Movie: Grow Up, Timmy Turner!
programme.desc: When Timmy's childhood friend, Tootie, returns to town, Timmy is forced to deal with new crushy feelings for the once-dorky-now-gorgeous Tootie.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Selling Out/ Funny Pants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sells his restaurant to a big company, but he soon finds retirement boring.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patty Caper/ Plankton's Regular
programme.desc: The secret ingredient in the Krabby Patty is stolen; the Chum Bucket gets a new customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned in Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob loves Krabby Patties so much, he just can't help singing and dancing when he's around the delicious sandwiches.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops a fear of Krabby Patties; Mr. Krab molts his shell before a reunion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Mrs. Puff, You're Fired
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into Krusty Towers, an upscale hotel where the customer is king, even the most obnoxious and demanding ones. This pushes Squidward to the point of quitting and returning as a guest to make a series of outrageous requests.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles get whisked through time by apprentice Time Master Renet, and they must all work together to defeat the evil Time Master Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tale of the Yokai
programme.desc: The Turtles are accidentally transported to the past where they cross paths with a familiar ninja clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Attack of the Mega Shredder!
programme.desc: Leo decides to sneak into Shredder's Lair alone only to face the biggest mutant threat yet.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Creeping Doom
programme.desc: After an accident, Donnie finds himself slowly losing his intelligence.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fourfold Trap
programme.desc: The Turtles are baited by an unknown enemy into deadly traps.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Dinosaur Seen in Sewers!
programme.desc: When Raph makes a new friend in Zog, an alien Triceraton, he may have bitten off more than he can chew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Midden Fleasure/ Tread or Alive
programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure. Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it. Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread to get him to act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: The Quacken/ The Treasure of Nosepatch
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Suck Toad/ Secret Admirer
programme.desc: Brittany is preparing a class speech on 'inner beauty' when an endangered species makes its home on her face. Alvin believes that Kevin has a secret crush on one of the Chipettes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Karate Kidder/ Playing Favorites
programme.desc: Dave, Simon and Theodore are worried for Alvin's safety after Alvin enters a karate contest. Later, when Alvin suspects Simon is Dave's favorite, he and Theo challenge Simon to a go-cart race to win Dave's favor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Un-send!/ The Orb
programme.desc: Simon accidentally sends an email venting about a professor and the boys must keep the teacher from reading it! Theodore has a hard time saying no and trouble ensues when Alvin needs Theodore to say yes.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to Basics/ Report Cards
programme.desc: Everyone thinks Simon has lost his mind after he fails a school test and moves into a tree for some alone time. Alvin worries about his bad report card and does everything he can to intercept the mail before Dave sees it.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Flabber Gassed
programme.desc: After acting too confident before a fight, Kid Danger and Captain Man are sprayed with Flabber Gas, making them powerless to defeat a new villain in Swellview. Schwoz puts our heroes in Exo-Suits which Charlotte and Jasper control.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Back to the Danger
programme.desc: Piper is taken by a creature from another dimension. Captain Man and Kid Danger must rescue her from the Evil Science Corporation that opened the portal.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Birthday
programme.desc: While trying to celebrate his birthday, Henry keeps getting interrupted by crimes going on in Swellview.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Whistlin' Susie
programme.desc: After activating an atomic bomb in the 'Man Cave,' Ray and Henry decide to drive it out into the Swellview desert in order to save the city that they protect.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Girl with the Dragon Snafu
programme.desc: Phoebe joins the 'cool' group for a class project, only to find that they do not want to work as hard as she does. Max takes Phoebe's usual spot in her friends' group, and tries to coast by letting them do all the work.

programme.title: The Thundermans: On the Straight and Arrow
programme.desc: Cherry asks Max to use his superpowers to help her get her driver's license, but Phoebe's jealously of their new bond threatens her relationship with her best friend.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Phoebe vs. Max: The Sequel
programme.desc: Phoebe's first assignment as a superhero is to protect Hiddenville, which proves too easy until she challenges Max to inject some mischief into their sleepy hometown.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Why You Buggin'?
programme.desc: After discovering that Link's ex-girlfriend is a secret supervillain who wants Link for herself, Phoebe enlists Max's help in exposing her rival's true motives.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Snooze Pods/ Sticky Vicky
programme.desc: Jasper becomes trapped in a dream using one of Schwoz's Snooze Pods. Henry's field trip to the Museum of Celebrity Garbage is cut short by the arrival of Sticky Vicky.

programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rebirth! Master Devolos!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: No Stone Unturned!
programme.desc: A chance meeting with another Trainer gives Ash and Rowlet new battle experiences.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Marty & McGee
programme.desc: Popular radio personalities Marty and McGee meet at the crossroads of southern culture and college football.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.
